title: Attention Is Governed
prompt: Ask what the system makes visible, what it hides, and what objectives shape attention routing.

title: Engagement Is Not Value
prompt: Review whether metrics reward quality, agency, public knowledge, and well-being rather than attention capture alone.

title: Contestability Protects Creators and Users
prompt: Check whether moderation, ranking, demonetization, and recommendation decisions can be understood, appealed, and repaired.
